name: kigumi-angular-team
description: Example team registry: Angular-based Kigumi compositions. Demonstrates the cross-framework conversion flow used by `kigumi add --from <url> --cross-framework`.
author: Kigumi

login-example.name: LoginExample
login-example.description: Login form composed of Card, Input, Button, and Icon. Standalone Angular component with inline template; no separate CSS file.
